scripts.migrate:up: cd .. && node db/scripts/check-migration-policy.mjs && node db/scripts/migrate.mjs up
scripts.migrate:down: cd .. && node db/scripts/check-migration-policy.mjs && node db/scripts/migrate.mjs down
scripts.postgres:up: cd .. && node scripts/dev/ensure-local-env.mjs && (docker compose --env-file db/postgres/.env -f db/postgres/docker-compose.yml up -d --wait postgres || docker compose --env-file db/postgres/.env -f db/postgres/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres) && node db/scripts/wait-for-postgres.mjs && node db/scripts/check-migration-policy.mjs && node db/scripts/migrate.mjs up && node db/scripts/seed-postgres.mjs
scripts.postgres:down: cd .. && node scripts/dev/ensure-local-env.mjs && docker compose --env-file db/postgres/.env -f db/postgres/docker-compose.yml down
scripts.postgres:reset: cd .. && node scripts/dev/ensure-local-env.mjs && docker compose --env-file db/postgres/.env -f db/postgres/docker-compose.yml down --volumes && node scripts/dev/ensure-local-env.mjs && (docker compose --env-file db/postgres/.env -f db/postgres/docker-compose.yml up -d --wait postgres || docker compose --env-file db/postgres/.env -f db/postgres/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres) && node db/scripts/wait-for-postgres.mjs && node db/scripts/check-migration-policy.mjs && node db/scripts/migrate.mjs up && node db/scripts/seed-postgres.mjs
scripts.postgres:logs: cd .. && node scripts/dev/ensure-local-env.mjs && docker compose --env-file db/postgres/.env -f db/postgres/docker-compose.yml logs -f postgres
